_comment: 073: pre-registered Evaluation Contract v2 gate (fixed BEFORE any OOS run, III). Extends the 068/069 gate with a single tri-value decision, wired eval_window / no_decision_min_days, banded/tail ECE, and a renamed bootstrap primary + diagnostic sensitivities. Do not edit after OOS results are generated (confirmatory mode rejects a hash mismatch).

subgroup_guard._comment: intersection-union: ADOPT requires ALL critical subgroups PASS. A critical subgroup that is NO_DECISION (underpowered) maps the OVERALL decision to NO_DECISION (not REJECT); a critical subgroup FAIL maps to REJECT.

eval_window._comment: Pre-registered OOS window (III), frozen before results. 2008-2026 is development evidence (US4); a real confirmatory window is registered separately in the DORMANT prospective holdout.

ece_subsets._comment: FR-006: ECE measured over the whole plus fixed-boundary subsets. Each subset carries a missing bucket, a min_count and min_days floor, and a NO_DECISION rule when underpowered. Stage limited to raw + model-internal calibrated win prob (FR-007); two-gamma / stage-discount stages depend on Feature 074.

tail_mask._comment: FR-006: the tail is defined by a pre-registered common mask (result-blind), NOT by each arm's own bet selection (which would move the eval set per arm). Arm-specific tail is diagnostic only.

bootstrap._comment: FR-013/014: primary estimator is the race-day cluster bootstrap (renamed from the misnomer 'moving_block'; identical numbers). Sensitivities are DIAGNOSTIC only and are never ANDed into the gate. seed/block kept from 069 so v1 numbers reproduce.

determinism._comment: SC-003: same seed + single thread reproduces primary metrics within tolerance.
